chapter_title.en: Chapter 36 – The compelling upon the Hajj

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسنه الفضلء - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/155)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسنه الفضلء - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/155)
text: لَوْ أَنَّ النَّاسَ تَرَكُوا الْحَجَّ لَكَانَ عَلَى الْوَالِي أَنْ يُجْبِرَهُمْ عَلَى ذَلِكَ وَ عَلَى الْمُقَامِ عِنْدَهُ وَ لَوْ تَرَكُوا زِيَارَةَ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَكَانَ عَلَى الْوَالِي أَنْ يُجْبِرَهُمْ عَلَى ذَلِكَ وَ عَلَى الْمُقَامِ عِنْدَهُ فَإِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُمْ أَمْوَالٌ أَنْفَقَ عَلَيْهِمْ مِنْ بَيْتِ مَالِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hafs Bin Bakhtary, and Hisham Bin Salim, and Muawiya Bin Ammar, and others,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘If the people neglect the Hajj, it would be upon the governor that he compels them upon that, and upon the staying with it; and if they were to neglect the visitation of the Prophet<sup>saw</sup> (the Holy Shrine in Medina) it would be upon the governor that he compels them upon that, and upon the staying with it. So if they do not happen to have the wealth for them, he should spend from the Public Treasury of the Muslims’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hafs af-Bakhtariy and Hisham ibn Salim and Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar and others who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that if people neglect performing al-Hajj, the authorities will force them to perform al-Hajj and to reside therein. If people neglect visiting the Holy Prophet, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, the authorities will force them to do so and reside there. If they will not be able to bear the expenses, the authorities will pay for them from the public treasury.”
